name: supersim-interactions-and-opinteroptoken-contracts
description: - I developed a script for interactions with chains of Supersim like transferring tokens seamlessly between local OP chains.  - Developed also a sample token that is SuperchainERC20 bridgable called OpInteropToken. - When you are working with Supersim and Interop, always consider that you must deploy tokens at the same address in all chains. You can use CREATE2 for this purpose.
